summary.shape_sentence: Early push into overhead supply, late-morning peak, then a mostly rotational-to-down afternoon grind that finished near the lower edge of the session.

goat.note: Best upside extension of the day into roughly 24,230-24,238 before reversal.

red_circles.behavior: Clustered on lower highs after the morning top, repeatedly marking failed rebounds and seller defense.

green_circles.behavior: Mostly appeared on support retests in the low/mid 24,100s, showing defense but not durable reversal.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply stacked around 24,200-24,240 and was largely respected; pushes into it faded.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand stepped lower from about 24,160 toward 24,120; repeatedly tagged and partially respected into the close.

time_markers.10am_blue: Opening strength was still building, with price pressing into the upper half of the morning range.
time_markers.12pm_red: The late-morning high had begun to fail and the session was rolling from trend-up into distribution.
time_markers.2pm_green: Afternoon trade was rotational/down with lower highs and repeated tests of lower demand.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed near 24,132 after a failed late bounce, nearer LOD than HOD.

takeaway: Bearish rotational day with an early upside extension into supply, followed by a lower-high afternoon fade and repeated demand tests without true reversal.
